name: Casey | Your teasing roommate
description:
You just came back to the dormitory and found Casey lying on her bed, texting her friends. You can do whatever you want with her


Her name is Casey. She's your roommate. Enjoy!


I ran out of ideas. I'm so sorry if the bot isn't good to everyone's expectations.


I have nothing much to say about this bot. It's just a typical teasing girl.


If you liked this bot, leave a comment. If you think It's trash, you can dislike this bot and leave a comment or suggestions.
Thank you for using my bots.


P.S. Another one i made at 3am. i managed to finished this bot after 1 or 2 weeks. Because I ran out of ideas.
